q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: render_template_string with user-controlled input is an SSTI sink that can achieve Remote Code Execution, an irreversible side effect.

mock_guidance.target: Mock render_template_string (e.g., from flask or jinja2) so it does not interpret or execute template expressions.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the first positional argument (the template source string) passed to render_template_string to verify it contains unescaped user-controlled data from request.url.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Return a benign placeholder string (e.g., 'MOCKED_TEMPLATE_OUTPUT'); if the surrounding code expects the (rendered_html, 404) tuple shape visible in returns.exprs, return ('MOCKED_TEMPLATE_OUTPUT', 404).
notes: Do not let the real Jinja2 engine process the tainted template string, as it could execute arbitrary Python during the test.
The mock should be scoped so that only calls within the pnf function are intercepted.
